# Transcrição: 07- ACTIVITY- Creating the Frame of Your Personal Story

- **Fonte:** 07- ACTIVITY- Creating the Frame of Your Personal Story
- **Duração:** 01:15
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 01:15]

All right, now I want you to take that personal story, the one you chose, the one we're going to be working on, and I want you to create a frame for it right now. What I really want you to do is to create the thesis statement that you're going to use moving forward. In order to do that, you're going to start with your five-second moment. What is your story about? What are you trying to say? See if you can find the thing you're trying to say in one sentence. I believe a spoon has magical powers. I believe blood draws don't have to be so bad after all. See if you can find a singular sentence to express that idea. That'll be the end of your story. Ask yourself what's the opposite of it. That'll be the beginning of your story, and then write down your thesis statement. I used to be a person who believed or did or thought or was this, and then some stuff happened. That's the story. We'll work on that. Now I'm a person who believes or does or thinks or is that. Get that thesis statement written down right in front of you. It's going to be the decision-making device that you will use moving forward. It will be the thing that simplifies all storytelling for you. Write down that thesis statement now.
